{{Quote|The Mecrosa Order survived the Cleansing of the Nine Houses, but all its Sith and Force-sensitive members were wiped out.|Annotation by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] in the ''[[Book of Sith]]''|<ref name="BoS" />}}
The '''Cleansing of the Nine Houses''' was one of the conflicts of the [[Old Sith Wars]],<ref name="TSD" /> occurring soon after the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|defeat]] of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="JvS" />

The details were lost to history, but it appears to have been a civil war in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[House Pelagia]] battled the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-influenced [[Mecrosa Order]] of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], which was sponsored by [[House Mecetti]]. During the conflict, [[House Melissus]] and [[House Barong]] were absorbed by House Mecetti.

Among those involved in the purge was Jedi Knight [[Duron Qel-Droma]], cousin of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic]], who sought to redeem the [[Qel-Droma]] name by aiding in the destruction of lingering Sith remnants.<ref name="KotORCG" />

{{Battle-stub}}
